channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 261 replies — 359.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 261 • Updated: 2026-04-07 10:08 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62068446
12 more hours and the thread will be alive for 30 days and that's when Gavin Wood gives me 11.5k DOT for my "influencing" of your young Vishnus of the mindchain.

62068604
i buy this shit at 6.6$ or -75% from ATH
NOW I M AT -90% DOWN

62068658
>>62068604
yeah the decline of this shit has been remarkable. and it still somehow has a $2 billion market cap.

62069192
>>62068658
im very disappointed

62069282
>>62069192
Good. Now sell so I can GIGA short it some more while shilling it on 4chan. You activated my trap card anon "Backstabbing shill" (Effect: Convince people DOT is THE SOLUTION while having a giga short open at the same time).

62071796
100$ end of bull run. And it's official, the thread has stayed alive for 30 days and therefore Gavin Wood will pay me 11.5k$. That will feed Mumbai for literally a whole year.

Thank you Vishnu

62072073
>>62071796
You're welcome.

Don't I get a little something

62073144
>>62072073
But of course Panjali, your are a citizen of Mumbai city, the city of DOT. Every citizen gets paid. We all get feed and loved by our kind lord Gavin Wood. He is the underworld CP kingpin. He sells Cheese Pizza and then redistributes the funds among DOT holders. Everyone in Mumbai is eating and licking Cheese Pizza. I also like to put some cream onto my Cheese Pizza and then lick it off.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62075463
100$ end of bull run

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62077075
Every day after the 30th day I get 150 DOT as a bonus. If we keep the thread alive for 30 more days I'll get 30 * 150 = 4500 more DOT. Please help contribute so my village of Mumbai gets feed.

62078039
>>62077075
You are not in India

62078216
>>62078039
This is my hand >>62008295 young Vishnu. This was taken directly from Mumbai, the city of DOT.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62078593
Dont selling my dotty anymore

62078595
75

62078631
Depressing thread

62078789
>>62078216
Fake

62079572
>>62078631
Well, I've already got my 11.5k DOT that Gaving promised me and every day this thread stay alive I get an additional 150DOT. Doesn't really seem depressing to me

>>62078593
>>62078595
100$ END OF BULL RUN

>>62078789
I am brown as chocolate itself. I am a true Mumbai warrior

Thank you for keeping the thread alive my Mumbai warriors. You are feeding your village. This is a cooperative effort. The mumbai boys strike AGAIN


Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62079598
This is the most damaging thread for dot in history

62079614
>>62079598
Read this >>62069282. We're playing this whole board. They're eating right out of our hands. First we make them believe that DOT is held by the GLAMOROUS citizens of Mumbai. Then at the same time we pocket the money from Gavin Wood for keeping the thread alive. AND at the same time we SHORT IT TO 0$. The whole city of Mumbai is in on it. INDIA SUPER POWER BY 2020 wasn't a lie. It's a FACT for 6 years already.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62079649
>>62079614
But is the tech good?

62079750
>>62079649
Literally THE BEST chain currently. And no, I'm not just making shit up. It literally does what everyone else is trying to do. Once JAM + NOMT hit it'll be able to do MILLIONS of TPS (not just value tx) while doing continous compute, while being 100% decentalized, while the tx will be CHEAP, while having NATIVE interoperability, while being able to control other chains and never leave DOT, ... This projects is THE project and people are still buying meme coins. It's UNFATHOMABLE.

62080914
I hope you guys smell the bottom. I can smell the bottom of the Vishnu mindchain. I hope you're going in HARD and DEEP. I hope you guys are PENETRATING THE BOTTOM of the market. I hope you're bouncing up and down on that bottom. I hope you're eating that bottom out and scooping it up. Mmmm, that delicious Vishnu bottom. It has a great taste inside my mouth. I hope you guys are enjoying it as much as I am. I'll leave some cream for you so it tastes even better.

62080937
>>62079649
DOT is literally the most superior blockchain out there. Everything that other people promise and don't deliver DOT already has. Everything that other people lie about and can't do DOT can do. The really BIG upgrade we're waiting on is JAM and NOMT this year
Read more here >>62026407 and >>62056612 and >>62056570. NOMT + JAM scale the network to more a few million or maybe 10-20m TPS. We currently have the highest recorded TPS on a live network (https://data.parity.io/spammening). 143.3k TPS on a live network (NOT TEST NET BULLSHITERY like the other chains are showcasing). This was done one 23 of the 100 cores that are available. So this was only 23% of the full capacity. Some cores are already sold to other chains therefore we can't do a full test. But you can guesstimate the numbers, right? And since the last spammening the throughput has gone up. We could now probably do like 250k TPS from 23 cores or something like that. Just look at the "Performance Charts" on the page I linked. The fees were literally almost always below 0.05$. The fees were around 0.03 to 0.015$ even when the network handled 140k TPS. Do you remember how Solana halted the network literally 8x due to it being congested and shit like that? That can't happen on DOT. The average finality was 16.58s. The thing is though, we'll soon be getting 500ms blocks. When the tests were conducted the block times were still 12s? Now they're 6s and soon they'll be 500ms (Basti blocks). A lot is happening on DOT this year!
Also if you look at the stats the network has been growing over time https://data.parity.io/parachain-stats?selection-mode=include&frequency=daily

62080949
>>62079649
Also combine that with the new tokenomics and the long term vision for the project... I really don't see this project becoming irrelevant to be honest. It simply JUST FUCKING DOES WHAT IT'S SUPPOSED TO DO. The other L2s are behind and they won't catch up ever in my opinion. Once JAM hits DOT will be AT LEAST 5 to 10 years ahead of all the major L2s and L1s. It's not even comparable to be honest. People are blind to not see it. Sooner or later people will wake up and realize "OMG, I've been a degenerate memecoin gambler while I could buy the Vishnu of the blockchain".
Simply put, this project does what others promise and don't deliver. DOT has already DELIVERED and is DELIVERING even more amazing things that no other chain has and if they do they don't package it like DOT does. Sure ICP has continous compute, but does it have native interoperability and can host L2s and smart contracts and has 500ms block times and is decentralized and has shared security to his L2s and has the best governance system in crypto and has over a few million TPS and has ... and has ... Bro, it's fucking impossible to beat DOT on technical superiority. Some day people will realize that they can't build a new use case on the other chains. That they're LIMITING THEMSELVES by staying on shit like ARB or POL or some other fucking shit like that. A few months back Polkadot Asset Hub launched and people can simply copy paste EVM code to DOT and it'll work. We're currently waiting for this referendum (https://polkadot.polkassembly.io/referenda/1864) to pass in order for Uniswap and Safe to launch on Asset Hub. Other major projects will probably follow. Should pass any day now. Slow and steady wins the race

62081930
>>62079750
>>62080914
>>62080937
>>62080949

Why should we believe some one from India

62082053
>>62081930
Truth is not to be believed. Truth is to be seen. Just try the chain out. And look at the data. I've provided you with plenty of evidence. You SHOULD NOT believe me. The essence of crypto is what? DYOR. Do Your Own Research. We really did forget our roots, didn't we?

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62082374
>>62081930
I actually applaud you to be honest. Anon, I'm proud of you. Thank you for having CRITICAL thinking. We need more people like you. And again DYOR and you WILL come to similar if not EXACTLY THE SAME conclusions. I dare you, I double dare you, I triple dare you.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62084668
100$ end of bull run

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62085029
75.
y2029

62085250
>>62026429
imagine being really hard to develop on, because your system uses a particularly confusing superset of rust, and then scrambling to make an EVM to attract more developers. no sympathy for rust faggots.

item.title: There are NO jobs left — 26 replies — 104.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
There are NO jobs left

Open thread • Replies: 26 • Updated: 2026-04-07 10:49 UTC

OP

> 8 in 10 jobs posted online are FAKE
> those 2 in 10 jobs that aren't fake are all looking for either a buddy, family member, internal, senior level, or a literal unicorn for their positions

It's truly the end times now, isn't it?

Early replies (first 3)

62084288
Now you see why war is necessary. That will create a ton of jobs that you can do.

62084296
>>62084281
There's plenty of jobs it just the wages won't go up. I quit my shitty QC job and got another one a week later.

62084378
>>62084281
yeah there literally arent.. all these companies keep firing tens of thousands of people and we barely create any jobs

even dog shit mcwage jobs are impossible to get. Before covid you put in 10 applications and got a 3 stage interview into offer. Now its all fucked up

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62084387
>>62084281
It's over.

62084394
>>62084378
>even dog shit mcwage jobs are impossible to get
Nowadays they prefer mexicans/bilingual (Spanish) if you live in the U.S.. Most mcwage fast food jobs are staffed entirely by cliques of mexicans who do everything they can to make sure only fellow mexicans are hired and hazing any non-mexicans until they are fired or quit. Based

62084427
>>62084394
dude ive been noticing that exact thing its funny as fuck.. Every five guys, mcdonalds, wendys i walk into is literally all mexicans speaking strictly Spanish to each other. There is that one token bilingual guy who sits at the cash register because no on else that works there has any clue wtf is going on

seriously its gotten to the point its impossible to not notice. Ive been not paying attention and ignoring it for a while but yeah its at an insane stage now. I live in a pretty affluent big US city

62084564
>>62084427
My local place is all thicc latinas. It’s wonderful

62084597
>>62084281
If it’s any consolation, this isn’t new. Even before ai, HR was still flooding the boards with fake job postings and filtering you with their algorithms.

62084622
>>62084288
Are you willing to kill for cash?

Are you willing to die for cash?

Are you willing to get yelled at and only have 5 minute showers for cash?

Are you willing to run for an ungodly amount of miles for cash?

62084633
>>62084281
You can join the army and fight for Israel

62084881
>>62084288
I'm sure once the draft captures and culls a chunk of the population more positions will be available, true.

62084910
>>62084881
There’s no draft you dumbass fudposter. America did 20 years in Afghanistan without one, we won’t need one now

62084973
>>62084910
AI creates an intense need for a draft though.

62085020
i can barely get 100 dollars, trump's war has ruined my country

62085050
>>62084622
yes
no
yes
I do it for free

Never signing up btw

62085265
>>62084394
i no longer eat fast food because of this. brown stinking mystery meat shit skins gibber jabbering in a grotesque slave language? no thanks!

62085276
>>62084394
>>62084427
>>62085265
why would you want to work in a fast food with subhuman shitskins to begin with?

also stop eating this shit, it gives ass cancer

learn a trade if you are that desperate, tell a white business owner you can work for free for 2-3 months in order to learn the job

no one is going to refuse that

62085278
>>62085276
>learn a trade if you are that desperate, tell a white business owner you can work for free for 2-3 months in order to learn the job
jewish hands typed this post.

62085283
>>62085278
im eastern european and it dont seethe over shitskins to have a mcwagie job

62085287
>>62084281
Yes, the only thing left is to rage against the machine that created this system by shitposting things glowie Jannies hate.
>no job
Make their lives miserable
>no gf
Motivate them to send you a mk ultra sex kitten honeypot gf
>can’t afford gas
Blame Israel and American politicians until everyone wakes up to the true cause of our suffering

You have your marching orders and solutions to this problem

62085288
>>62085283
>romanian contemplating what he would do for a job, assuming he ever actually had to get a job

62085289
>>62084281
I've always got work for you, wagie. Always.

62085290
>>62084973

62085292
>>62084378
>10 applications and got a 3 stage interview into offer. Now its all fucked up
crazy how you don't realize how broken that system is, and you're romanticizing it.

But 2019 was definitely better than now. 2014 even. 2009 even.

62085296
>>62085288
the unemployment rate in my country is 3,4% and this is not even counting all the people working for cash and just paying their healthcare insurance to the state that are counted in the unemployed group

you got your diversity, your inclusivity and your fairness now you reap what you sow mutto, my country is whiter than yours and we have jobs

62085308
>>62084281
Just keep trying bro. She's out there somewhere waiting :)

item.title: >I would be a millionaire right now had I not sold my BTC 10 years ago How do I stop the suicidal thoughts whenever I am… — 17 replies — 68.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>I would be a millionaire right now had I not sold my BTC 10 years ago How do I stop the suicidal thoughts whenever I am…

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-04-07 10:46 UTC

OP

>I would be a millionaire right now had I not sold my BTC 10 years ago
How do I stop the suicidal thoughts whenever I am in the middle of the wagecage?

Early replies (first 3)

62084173
just think about how SBF's doing right now

62084179
>>62084173
Probably getting gaped, if he's lucky he got his adderall prescription behind bars and therefore maybe he's enjoying it

62084180
>>62084173
He got bailed out of jail thanks to the jews overlords, and has tons of millions of stolen dollars free to use whenever he wants.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62084217
>>62084159
there are opportunities constantly. every year hundreds of stocks 10x. every day hundreds of options 10x.

62084300
>>62084159
U can still becum a millionaire if you buy beyond meat stocks or anything yuan treasury bonds

62084390
>>62084159
Console yourself with the possibility that you died from rockfish poisoning while vacationing in Australia in the timeline where you had millions and years of free time to kill

62085113
>>62084217
with money from 10x more stocks crashing to 10%.

62085118
>>62084173
>a mere 5 years later his Anthropic shares would be worth $30 billion today if he hadn't gotten greedy and stolen from his customers at FTX

62085192
You could be me. I bought bitcoin in 2013 when it was like 15 usd a coin and spent it all on drugs from black market reloaded and silk road.

62085206
You don't, you let it eat away and consume you forever.

62085214
>>62085192
you gotta admit the acid was totally worth it though

62085225
>>62085118
Kek
Outjewed by his own hand

62085227
>>62085214

Never tried acid. Mostly research chemicals, weed and shrooms. I also bought quarter sticks of dynamite and put one inside of a tree one time and it almost fell over the explosion was so big. This was back when you could buy literally anything, including grenades, fully automatic weapons, pistols with no serial #'s etc. Black Market reloaded didn't last that long it was shoa'd pretty quickly by feds.

62085229
>>62084159
well, you buy chainlink, watch your networth shrink to nothing very slowly and find a very tall place....

62085245
>>62084159
If you didnt sell 10 years ago you would have sold 8 years ago or 5 years ago. Then you still would have paid maybe close to half in taxes. So you would still most likely be right where you are today even if you didnt sell 10 years ago, this is the reality of investing. Just make as much money as you can and dont dwell on that bullshit

62085284
>>62085245
>Then you still would have paid maybe close to half in taxes
capital gains tax is around 20% in most countries

62085302
>>62084159
Very few people held past 10x, never mind 100x or 1000x. Smart people offload portions instead of selling it all and always keep a moonshot. You are just not smart and you probably would have blown that wealth on dumb shit like a sports car and an overpriced house in a suburb.
Your BTC is in better hands now.
>>62084300
Kek what is the bull case for BYND?

item.title: pftt... hahahah... AhahaHHAHA, FHAHAHAHAHA LMFAO@!!! Back in the office wagie!! Remember to bring that can-do attitude a… — 40 replies — 56.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
pftt... hahahah... AhahaHHAHA, FHAHAHAHAHA LMFAO@!!! Back in the office wagie!! Remember to bring that can-do attitude a…

Open thread • Replies: 40 • Updated: 2026-04-07 10:09 UTC

OP

pftt... hahahah... AhahaHHAHA, FHAHAHAHAHA LMFAO@!!! Back in the office wagie!!

Remember to bring that can-do attitude and be sure to look extra busy when you finish your entire workday in a few hours, remember, you have to be there for eight! LOL!!

Early replies (first 3)

62080353
>>62080322
And people actually dislike WFH, thats wagie Stockholm syndrome right there.

62080368
>>62080322
Working is good.

62080469
>>62080322
I just eat like 15 snacks every day at work and only work for about 4 hours a day while browsing on 4chan and writing my political cosmic horror dystopia.

Enjoy missing out on your compunding power though lol

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62080924
>>62080322

62080926
>>62080829
No jeets allowed in my thread, go feed the village saar.

62080928
>>62080475
kill yourself, also, re-read it the text, and then kill yourself again.

62080959
>>62080928
>>62080924

This nigga was beyond correct

62081450
>>62080322
>Seeing your second family
no amount of shilling would make that slave farm my second family

62081458
>>62081450
You actually spend more time with co-workers then your actual family. LMFAO.

62081500
>>62080353
I haven't met anyone who disliked WFH. Sure, some missed the office in the middle of covid, but that's about that.

62081505
>>62080516
Long before they "die off", there won't be any work. Two years, then automated capital investment to business execution, highest position minimum wage. 15 years to total robot. Ladder's up.

62081534
>>62081458
nah i quit few years ago, never going back

62081592
>>62080322
It's a bank holiday today in England, where your picture was taken

62081771
>>62080322
Bro everyone knows youre miserable, broke, and you still live with your parents in your late 20s. You will never get a gf cuz they all see you as an inept weird piece of garbage.
Have fun beating your meat to hentai for the 137th time this month. And dont even deny this, i seee you idiots all the time on discord. You literally say shit like this as cope, every day i hear "im gonna fix my life" and it never comes. In reality you wish you were normal like the rest, but youre not. Youre just a freak that will undoubtly die alone.

62081773
>>62081771
That's the kind of attitude I like, wagie, see you at 06:00 sharp

62081779
>>62081773
Just spitting facts, i havent seen 1 single neet that is genuinely happy with his position in life. The vast majority are doomers waiting for a societal collapse that will never come.
Besides a couple of neets ive seen that had the luck to be trustfund kids, all the rest that are broke and do it from their parents house live shameful miserable lives as social outcasts and shit on wagies as cope.

62081797
>>62081779
yeah, i would not want to be a neet. i have been unemployed by choice before a couple of times but it gets old after a couple of months.

62081802
>>62081773
Holy based, owned that freak. Hes writing FUMING paragraphs while we respond with one sentence memes.

62081816
>>62081802
Yet you read it fully, you worthless neet fuck. Cant escape the truth, the clock doesnt tick only for the wagie, with each passing day you dig deeper into your hole from which you will never be able to escape.

62081819
>>62081816
Dont worry moneystein appreciates your efforts.

62081820
>>62081773
You've done him
>>62081771
He's done you big time

62081943
>>62080487
My literature will be on Barnes and Noble front tables 3 years from now.

62081949
>>62080322
checked and keked

62081969
>>62080475
absolutely american response

62082067
>>62080516
wagies mostly have poor homelives.

62082497
>>62080959
he called out the dangers of technology well.
"return to monke" isn't a good solution, imo. according to his beliefs everything is just fucked

62082534
>>62081969
It’s actually mostly jeets that are obsessed with black penis

62082580
>>62082534
Doesn't matter if the accounts are in India, they're still white women having sex with Black men

62082599
>>62082580
you misread "bcc" as "bbc". you are brainwashed or psyopping. either way, kill yourself. White girls that fuck black men, view them as dogs. Both parties do it for attention, "so edgy".

62082639
>>62082534
Indians are pathetic. Only blacks are less desireable by whites than them.

62085226
WFH will not return, it will never happens.
> Loss of property value, something the big corp invested in
> The stupid and underqualified manager class will get sad
> Boomers will get sad, and we live in a gerontocracy, so this cannot happens. They also did not have access to this, and they categorically refuse any advancement they did not had access to.
> Bad optics, it might reveal that most desk-jobs are a daycare for adults.
> People would use less their cars, and big oil is against that : Less oil consumption, less insurance premium.

It would solve a lot of issues though. People would use less cars and transportations, thus less carbon emissions, they would live farther, and put less pressure in high-density areas like big cities, and pretty much solve a whole battery of problems, but it won't come back.
You'll get to the cagie, maybe get one, two days at home, and do you job like a nice little wagie.

62085247
>>62080322
>Posted from an open plan office at OPs entry level job

62085253
>>62081534
Based

item.title: Are you getting your nails and Botox done yearly? — 14 replies — 28.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Are you getting your nails and Botox done yearly?

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-04-07 10:22 UTC

OP

Are you getting your nails and Botox done yearly? Maybe if you did you wouldn't be a NEET still.

Early replies (first 3)

62084255
>>62084227
If your image is 100% necessary for your job, that shit is necessary.
Like a realtor always driving a new car.
If they don't, it sends a bad message.

62084271
>>62084255
this is wrong. whenever I see my realtor driving up with a big car the only message that comes to my mind is that his commission is very big and he is capable of scamming me. big red flag. I would unironically prefer if he would drive up on a bike.

62084298
>>62084271
agreed, my realtor better be living in a dumpster

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62084339
>>62084271
>>62084298
Yet normies do not trust people who aren’t promoting that image. My mom would rather use a realtor who looks successful than even consult her son/my brother because she thinks Dapper Dan will have better connections when in reality he was a yes man who listed it for a year way over value and then didn’t put “as is” on the contract so she had to spend 20k on her pool to sell it when her son has a massive CRE portfolio. If I was him I would be pissed but he laughed his ass off when he heard about it. They always fall for the bells and whistles

62084616
>>62084298
Kek yea and eating out of a trash can. Fuck realtors.

62084695
>>62084271
Anon, we are the 1% of weirdos that think that.
Normal Fags need to see new cars, otherwise they get suspicious.

62084744
>>62084227
>I spend $12,000 a year on Botox, hair, nails, and fitness. In Utah, they're necessary — especially in PR.
>Hilary Reiter Azzaretti,
a face made for anal.

62084778
>>62084255
>>62084271
If I saw any salesman driving uo in a high-end car, a beater, or a bicycle, I know they're a loser retard piece of shit bitch. The only acceptable mode of transportation would be a Toyota Corolla with custom wheels, or a Greyhound bus.

62084799
>>62084271
Boomers evaluate people based on how much money they have. More money = you are a better person and boomers are their primary clients nkt your broke millennial/zoomer ass

62084900
>>62084227
As an aging millennial male I am starting to wear sunscreen daily and use retinol cream. That’s about it

62084918
she spends $12k a year on beauty regimen at 40+ because she's sucking and fucking every man in her church, the pr job is just an excuse to get out of the house.
Mormons are FREAKY

62084929
my rich aunts do this and much more, something like 50k a year on shit like this. they are starting to look like the bogdanoffs

62085032
>>62084271
This

62085263
>>62084227
im 45 pounds overweight and balding and i wouldnt look twice at that used up whore who is clearly 15 years past her prime (i use this term very loosely.)

item.title: any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management… — 10 replies — 23.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management…

Open thread • Replies: 10 • Updated: 2026-04-07 10:26 UTC

OP

any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job
I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management experience but im not getting any offers on my applications
Should I get some cyber security certs? which ones should I focus on if yes?

Early replies (first 3)

62084718
Funny of you to ask OP, I remember my struggles of landing my first WFH job. Btw, WFH stands for Work from Home because not many people come across that term usually. But, if you must ask, our company is headquartered in Nashville. My base pay is 95k per year along with a COL stipend and generous health and pension benefits. As we speak, I am clocked into my position in the beautiful hot springs in British Columbia. We do have an RTO policy, but I haven't been to the office in 4 years! Ha-Ha! You COULDN'T pay me to work in the office. Yesterday I had fun fucking a uni student that transferred from china for the school years, so yeah life is great so far. Today she is making me her traditional Chinese dinner as a thank you for fucking her so nicely. Maybe next month I'll fly out to Holland and do my job for the month. But like I said OP, keep your chin up and don't be disuaded by the multiple rejection emails in your future until you get that golden offer. Take it and run with it. Anyways .... Chiao!

62084729
>>62084718
thanks for the response anon
Did you use indeed or pay for a website that specializes in WFH jobs like flexjobs etc? I'm wondering if indeed is just all scams at this point and if it might be worth it to pay a job finding website to filter the garbage

62084746
There are no jobs anymore. 200,000 people have been laid off in the last six months while job creation is negative. 90% of job openings go to immigrants anyway.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62084747
>>62084729
Mainly family connections.

62084759
>>62084746
>no more jobs
They hire new people every day faggot. Go post your demoralization shit somewhere else

62084791
>>62084746
yeah, I guess i'll just keep shitposting about the epstein files on /x/ until something works out

62084803
>>62084678
WFH is common in the technical writing field

62084965
>>62084718
Holy comfy
GIWTWM

62085002
>>62084678
so many green id’s in this thread
good sign op

62085269
>>62084791
best to give up and just hate on glowies by posting things they hate like Epstein
your inability to find a job is a sign to make their lives miserable or else they would make sure you found work

item.title: Safe investments — 19 replies — 14.9/hr

Safe investments

Open thread • Replies: 19 • Updated: 2026-04-07 09:35 UTC

OP

Aside from bonds, what other investments can project money?
Hard mode: no precious metals.

62081276
>>62081251

62081282
>>62081251

Tobacco
Marketable skills
SOXL

62081295
>>62081251

Probably one of these bad boys.

62081611

62081698
>>62081251

Gold

62081700
>>62081251

62081704
>>62081251

Forests.
Most real estate (anything you can rent out).

62081888

62081963

62083536
>>62081251

62083544
>>62081704

62084775

62084848

62085068

62085104

item.title: The US dollars was 70% of the world's reserve currency in 2016. — 85 replies — 13.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
The US dollars was 70% of the world's reserve currency in 2016.

Open thread • Replies: 85 • Updated: 2026-04-07 04:40 UTC

OP

The US dollars was 70% of the world's reserve currency in 2016. It's 39% now.

Early replies (first 3)

62074981
>>62074965
lol no, the financial bust part is the great depression, the revolution and wars is the period between the end of ww2 and 2008, debt and restructuring was 2008 onwards

62074987
Seems like a silly unfounded chart given that gold were the main reserves before the dollar.

62075007
>>62074981
>the revolution and wars is the period between the end of ww2 and 1971, debt and restructuring was 1971 to 2008(2020 maybe?), new world order from then on

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62077415
>>62074987
And gold has now surpassed the dollar as international reserve asset.

62077421
>>62077415
and? A shovel to your head and your gold stack changed the owner. There is only one universal currency among humans, its violence and the state only has mercenaries, with the state as a concept being bankrupt.

Mercenaries are great in peace times, in times of stress they are the ones ending the Prince

62077847
>>62077390
>bro I learned about solar and batteries in the 80’s. It MUST be the same ok?

The absolute state

62077968
>>62077847
You can spew the marketing shit as much as you like, LIB+solar is not going to run an industrialized economy.
>b-but china
no. China is as good as dead if it doesn't either sucks uncle sams dick real good, or invades Siberia and Kamchatka

62078052
>>62076603
England isn't even in EU dumbo

>>62077421
The absolute delusion in this thread lmao

62078161
>>62077968
Nobody said it will be the only source of power. It will the cheapest and safest with the fossils as backups. Midwit.

62079317
>>62078161
>marketing fag paddling back
lol. That is equal to admit that you are full of shit.
China has two options, conquer Siberia and Kamchatka or suck uncle sams dick real good, which means buying up as much debt as uncle sam wants to shove down chinas throat

62079408
>>62074965
so don't hold cash?

62079861
>>62078052
The EU is part of the American Empire and it will collapse with the collapse of the American Empire.
We should all want that to happen because the people who control America are genuinely evil and have no love for anyone outside of themselves.
They have turned Westerm civilisation into a Marxist slave plantation.

62080101
>>62079317
>noooooo you cannot obtain your power mostly from renewables and keep fossils as a backup, you MUST get 100% from renewables and erase the fossil industry or you are full of shit reeeeeeeeee

62080638
>>62074965
>Wars don't happen before the peak
I believe this is wrong

62080643
>>62074965
The Donald Trump effect

62080679
>>62076103
Convert to judaism.

62081636
>>62080101
>Re-newable
bullshit marketing term that comes out of the mind of a braindead 20th century behavioralized boomer that is too stupid to understand HOW an electrical grid works.

>Gas-, wood-, coal-, oil-, nuclear-, hydro- generators
can be scaled up and down in minutes being adopted to offer and demand, produces a fairly predictable amount of electricity per generator unit, independent of unpredictable weather
>Solar, Wind
cannot be scaled up and down in minutes, doesn't produce in any way any form a predictable electricity output per unit, is 100% dependent on non-predictable weather

>b-but Batteries
>like in my matchbox car when I was 5 years old in the 70s
>I just plugged it in and than had power
You cannot run an industrialized economy with a few Terawatts of potential demand that may fluctuate by a few Gigawatts on a fucking batter that relies on unpredictable electricity over a net that cannot compensate for variations over 0.5Hz

62081934
>>62074965
>39%
Where is this number coming from?

62082083
>>62081934
its pulled out of his ass
The OP is a chink living in canada working for a chinese proxy engaged in p2p propaganda

62082104
>US is reported to be fucked
>China is the most in-debt country in the world per GDP and at the same time also has the worst fertility rate
>Europe is fully bogged down by bureaucracy
>Russia might be the most fucked of them all

Where is the future then? Some thirdie countries? SEA?

62082114
>>62075897
>soft power
"One day daddy America will recognize what a good bottom bitch I am, and all my sacrifices will be worth it!"

62083254
>>62082104
Probably Africa. Angola, Kenya, Nigeria, Dijbouti and Ghana. Those can replace Europe as host for US airforce refueling stations, drone and nuclear warhead parking lot, serves the same geostrategic role as Europe currently does, just better

62083313
>>62082114
Europe never sacrificed anything. Between 1914 and 1945 various European (proto)socialist sects and European communist banker clans fucked each other sideways and opened a lane for the US to become a global hegemon, which gave the US a rational to secure global trade intervening two times.

Since 1945 the US invested in todays inflation adapted dollar value around 10T dollars into Europe (not counting private investments), it practically rebuilt Germany, the Benelux, France and Italy on its tab, kept investing into Europe, paid practically the entire bill for Europes security for 70 years on US Millenials, GenZ and GenAs credit line, multiple times had its soldiers die to clean up European decolonialisation messes and opened its market for European goods, mainly German and France exports, fucking its own domestic market. What was the ROI? European nations made deals from the 1950s on with US enemies and competition, closed its market to US goods, harassed US companies, went again down the socialist sect roads and told the US at every moment to suck it up and fuck itself, while at the same time holding its hand open for gibs.

And yes between 1948 and 1990 it made some geostrategic sense to keep paying the bill and sucking it up. Since 1992 it was irrational, since 1998 it became suicidal. Today the point is reached to cut Europa lose and send it back into the late 19th century — impoverished agrarian shitholes who have no relevant energy resources, no relevant other resources and nothing that is actually worth keeping arrogant socialist communists pissing in the US face.

In all honesty, if I were the Potus and congress, I would throw a nuke on London, Madrid, Paris and Berlin, just to make a point showing every future "Ally" that if you keep pissing off the sugar daddy, you get a nuke

62083989
>>62074965
>The US dollars was 70% of the world's reserve currency in 2016. It's 39% now.
Stablecoins fix this

62084400
>>62083989
No. Control over 85% of global oil reserves does that. Stable coins are just a failed attempt at forcing private actors by legislative action to buy sovereign bond ponzis and by that making their own business model even more questionable of a ponzi as it already is. Crapto has no yield, its a pure greater fool ponzi scheme

62084571
>>62074965
so glad the lowest iq mutts got together to torch their fourth world shithole just as the rest of the world leaves them behind for good
starting new wars won't save you, in fact it only accelerates the collapse

62084585
>>62084571
We don't intend to rock the boat, we intend to sink it.

62084617
>>62075553
What the other guys said but we got a good exchange rate for the most part until recently

62084640
>>62075131
If China wanted to rule the world, they would ally with their neighbors & win easily.
Instead they war their neighbors every chance they get.
Which is why theyll never be more than 2nd rate.

62084641
>>62075904
he wants russian resources.
Its smart but not realistic. Maybe after Putin dies things can change.

62084650
>>62075553
It creats demand for dollars around the world. That keeps the price of dollars higher than it otherwise would be since new supply of dollars can be sent to other countries in exchange for manufacturered goods. This means the US doesn't need to have a massive manufacturing base at home which means less pollution and in general high stress and health risk jobs. Instead the US economy can function by basically finding various mechanisms to just hand the US population money which they can spend and eventually the money finds its way abroad. This creates a large service economy where most people don't actually do any "real work" like making shit. Now their job is just a way to inject money into the domestic economy so that it can then be sent over seas and then those people can use that money to buy things like US bonds(both corporate and government), oil, US stocks and other things that are traded in dollars. Jobs end up being less stressful, you work fewer hours, and there's lots of room to climb up since career ladders are just social structures to hand out money rather than actually give you real responsibility. There's still plenty of real jobs of course, but an insane amount of US jobs are the kind where you just sit at a computer and read emails and then send another email to someone else and that person tells the floormanager of a factory to tell their immigrant labor that there's overtime this weekend.

So Americans enjoy a high standard of living even compared to other developed countries. People own cars, get cheap fuel, imported goods are cheap, there's options to save with high returns and so on. If the dollar stopped being the reserve currency all the dollars that's currently floating around in the world economy would have little use outside the US and they'd flow back into the domestic economy. The dollar loses most of its value and the standard of living of Americans drops since they're losing access to foreign goods.

62084652
>>62082104
What future?

62084837
>>62075652
This and also the US can use it's global financial control as a weapon, which is what's pissing other countries off right now and causing de-dollarisation. But having the world reserve currency can also cause the whole world economy to dip like with 2008;

item.title: Financially Fucked By My Father — 56 replies — 12.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Financially Fucked By My Father

Open thread • Replies: 56 • Updated: 2026-04-07 06:28 UTC

OP

My dad has no life insurance. Still owes $75k on the mortgage with 8 years to go. He only has $5k in the bank and $5k in his 401k at 63 years old.

He doesn't do ANY maintenance on the house. The basement hasn't had a dehumidifier in it for 7 years and it's full of rat shit and probably mold. The roof is overdue by 2 years and it'll cost about $20k for a new roof. Water collects around the foundation of the house when it rains and he doesn't do anything about it. The water filters need to be changed twice a month, but he only does it once a month, so there's rust in both bathrooms. The master bathroom bathtub drain leaks into the basement and he hasn't fixed it in 4 years, so he just showers in the other bathroom. The kitchen sink leaks water. The fridge is brown from dirt and grime. The stove is covered in dirt and grime. The microwave above the stove is broken, so he has a separate microwave on the counter. The carpet is 20 years old and destroyed. The laminate flooring is peeling away. The window sills are bubbled and peeled from water damage. The furnace is 20 years old. The garage has no electricity running to it and the garage door is broken. He doesn't even fix that when he used to install and repair garage doors as a job for 30 years. There are cobwebs in the living areas. The porches are falling apart and it's a tripping hazard every time you walk up the stairs.

All he does is get drunk, jackoff to porn, blast music and mow the lawn.

Having a parent that is lazy, financially retarded and unhygienic will screw you over when it comes to owning and maintaining a home. I refuse to put $100k into the house to make it enjoyable to live in, especially when he's still living there.

My mom is awesome though and she lives with me.

Are you in the same situation, or did you get lucky enough to have intelligent, hardworking parents that actually care about your future finances?

Early replies (first 3)

62078756
>>62078722
so sound like a faggot

62078808
>insure house alot
>fire
>profit

62078820
>>62078722
Not really seeing how your dad's financial issues affect you at all though, much less how you are "financially fucked" by this.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62081239
>>62080670
>My concern right now is making sure my kids don't get too _much_ of an inheritance. It will make them soft and deprive them of accomplishment.

Give them responsibilities from young, help them get jobs in HS and give them a place in society. Problem solved. People think just having a kid live in a comfy house is enough, but you have to INSTRUCT the kid and guide him. Foster wisdom through experiences and reflection (explaining to the kid why you do the things you do).

62081248
>>62078722
Why don't you help him fix important stuff on the house? One day It'll be yours.

62081353
>>62078942
Stop bitching, my aunt stole my entire inheritance and ran it into the ground/spent it before our lawsuit could get a judgement. I feel bad for my dad but he was able to build everything back for himself and taught me how to make money by making me do it myself just like his dad. If you’re upset enough that it bothers you just know that making money is easy but it’s very slow. You may think $100 here and there is beneath you but if you scale it right after making that 1,000 times you are onto something. Then it compounds and grows from there and eventually it’s $500 a pop before you know it. I would sell things in bulk, or flip things. And I’m talking anything you can get cheap. I did coins, antiques, and furniture first, now I’m doing properties. It’s basically the same business model as selling drugs but you have to factor in taxes and shipping/misc expenses.

62081399
>>62078722
Did be at least buy you a home before fucking you?

62081401
>>62078854
The only thing more based is he wrenched on classic cars and played Quake 3

62081408
arent mutts houses made of plywood?

so this house is worthless anyway, just destroy it and sell the land when he dies

fucking faggot

62081418
My boomers parent are just hard wired to scam me into living the ideal real life.

62081433
>>62080252
Life in prison/10

62081434
>>62080727
Based!

62081439
>>62081248
He doesn't do any maintenance and I don't live there. Even if I did the basement, foundation and roof (which are the current priorities) he wouldn't maintain any of it. I'd rather just invest the cash in a brokerage and have liquidity instead of dumping into an asset where I can't access it unless I sell the property. And on average, only 70% of the cash used to renovate and repair a home goes into the equity of the house, at least according to the interest. So, if you dump $100k into repairing and renovating a home, you'll only increase the equity by about $70k.

62081480
>>62078968
yeah, i can tell you got kicked out of your parents house at 18 and actually bought their excuse huh? sorry your parents don't love you anon, that really sucks.

My parents are currently restoring their house for generational use when they die, fancy new backyard and everything.

62081481
>>62079915
my mum never took anything for her schizo until she had a total breakdown in her early 60s, now she's a bit of a zombie on the drugs, she was 'okay' prior to all that, but yeah. It sucks, hope your friend can keep it together long term.

Stay away from vaccines.

62081523
>>62081481
Thank you man.

62081603
>>62078968
good slave, abandon all familial ties and be the perfect atomic consumer labor unit

62081615
>>62081353
lmao bruh i'm not even mad about it
shit just is what it is, happens a lot

62081637
HAHAHAH OH ACTUALLY WOW
How can you be so fucking entitled to say your father fucked YOU over?

I have always have the mindset that I will get nothing from my parents and will have to make whatever I want myself
They only way your parents fucked you over was to raise you to be such a fucking prick that assumes he need mommy or daddys money to even live a decent life

62081660
>>62078722
Similar father here OP

>gets made redundant from civil service role (how i have no idea)
>spends it all on trip to NY with my sister (fuck me and my mum i suppose)
>Tries to claim unemployment benifits
>Mother is working so he is entitled to fuck all
>"Ugh they wont give me a thing"
>does nothing
>sleeps 15 hours a day
>wants to "fix" the garden
>Asks me for money then never does anything
>"Yeah i never got around to getting the stuff"
>Me and mother work constantly to keep house going
>ive sank thousands into a new heating system, paying bills, fixing shit etc

I want to move out but i feel bad just abandoning everyone, the place WILL go to shit big time if i stop paying bills and generally doing what my fucking father SHOULD be doing

62081724
>>62081439
The issue is that water damage starts slow and manageable, but if not addressed it will completely destroy things for good. spending 5k on repairs now might save you 100k in just 5 years. Mold/erosion/water damage is absolute "house cancer" and you want to get rid of it fast!

62081758
>>62081660
your father clearly has depression and no motivation to fix his life. He must feel no purpose at all. Maybe if you or your sister had children he'd have something to do.

>>62081724
i think his dads house is at the point where simply bulldozing it and building another is the better option. Its america, they make their homes out of duct tape and plywood, it doesnt really matter. My small unit has full internal copper water and gas piping though, so thats not an option for me.

62081778
>>62081637
I'm in the top 7% of wealth for people my age. You people read WAY more into a post than what is actually there. That being said, leaving your only-child a home that's falling apart and still has $75k of debt (currently) on top of that is peak financial stupidity and a sign of complete laziness. It's not entitlement driving the irritation, it's the fact my father chooses to live this way and when that home is passed down you're left with the choice of paying off the remaining debt + spending over $100k repairing and renovating the property, or selling the property and losing the land entirely.

I don't understand how YOU don't understand the problem with this. Of course, you could just be trolling out of boredom.

>>62081724
It's way more than $5k already to fix the basement. It's already at $10k - $15k.

>>62081758
I've thought about that too and just keeping the land (3.5 acres). It's a modular double-wide ranch home. It's basically just a cheap doublewide trailer on top of a basement. 1,600 sqft.

62081783
>>62081758
>Can barely afford to keep this shithole going
>Bro just have a bunch of kids

62081790
>>62078722
You literally are a fat retard.

62081964
>>62078722
>All he does is get drunk, jackoff to porn, blast music and mow the lawn
Giga based. That{s my plan for the next 25 years. Your father has already seen the end of times and heard the echo of Nut's womb and saw that all is vanity.
t. 40 years old fag

62081991
>>62081408
Its OSB, not even plywood anymore. But little OP's dad is trailer trash, there's no reason to even maintain the house because it's worthless but dumbass OP doesn't realize this. Homebaggies really are retarded.

62082141
>>62078722
>All he does is get drunk, jackoff to porn, blast music and mow the lawn.
>Having a parent that is lazy, financially retarded and unhygienic will screw you over
Have some of his habits been installed in you?

62082730
>>62078722
You don't seem to give a shit about your father since you show no concern for his clearly poor mental state. He is likely severely depressed and just waiting to die but rather than thinking about how you can help him your only concern is that he isn't going to leave you a big payday when he croaks. So it seems to me that you will be getting exactly what you deserve. Nothing.

62082791
>>62082730
>I know the family dynamic between a father, his wife, his son and the rest of his family based on a few paragraphs about his poor financial decisions and lifestyle.

This is like blaming the family of a homeless junkie after they attempted to help him multiple times, take him to rehab and save him from himself.

62083742
>>62078722
>The furnace is 20 years old
I once rented a house with a 34 year old furnace. Not like olden immortal boiler or something, forced air natty has with an electric blower. 34 years. I found out the landlord didn't want to replace it as it would mean converting to a high efficiency unit as the old 80% units aren't legal to install here anymore. The high efficiency unit install was going to run upwards of 10k as there was no simple way to install the new pvc flue. Needless to say I did not stay there long. I found out when there was an ignition issue, which he had fixed, then curiously insisted on installing carbon monoxide detectors in every room.

62083898
at least you have one parent that owns some sort of house, even if its some shitty trailer. You don't have to act like you have this giant burden hanging over you. Just sell the turd and wash your hands of it. You're not complaining about inheriting a free house, are you? I wish I could say the same about my dad. He's in his 60s and owns nothing, not even a shitty trailer.

62084981
>>62083742
Good thing you got out of there. Wtf.

>>62083898
I like the land, the street and the town it's in. It's just the house is a total piece of shit and an eyesore, simply because of poor decision after poor decision. Trying to communicate anything to him is like trying to communicate to a toddler.

item.title: KABOOOOOOOOOOM **MASSIVE** RIPPLE XRP NEWS JUST LEAKED — 39 replies — 11.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
KABOOOOOOOOOOM **MASSIVE** RIPPLE XRP NEWS JUST LEAKED

Open thread • Replies: 39 • Updated: 2026-04-07 07:29 UTC

OP

Ripple is partnering with Convera to expand enterprise cross-border payments.

Together, they’re combining global payment rails with stablecoin-enabled settlement to improve speed, liquidity, and reliability.

>https://x.com/Ripple/status/2038969816187285516 (not fake or clickbait)

62057459
>>62057451

62057468
>>62057451

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62058947
BOOM BOOOM BOOM

62061203

62061366

62061409
Con

62061530
>>62057451
Not buying your heavy bags kike

62062460
>>62058935
>>62057468
These niggers cant google KEEEK

Originally known as Western Union Business Solutions before its 2021 acquisition, Convera reported over USD 190 billion in turnover in 2025 and serves more than 26,000 businesses worldwide. Headquartered in Seattle, it employs 1,001-5,000 people and focuses on tech-driven solutions for FX, compliance, and risk management.

62062479
>>62057451

XRP not needed lol

62062595

>dumps
Never gets old

62062632

It’s literally pumping right now linktard

62062694
>>62058947

62062728

>>62062479

62063129
>>62057451

62064107

62064147

FXCKING
BULLISH

62066653

62067672

item.title: Ripple is attending SIBOS 2026 — 34 replies — 10.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Ripple is attending SIBOS 2026

Open thread • Replies: 34 • Updated: 2026-04-07 07:30 UTC

OP

Its literally over for stinkers.

Ripple Treasury is officially attending Swift Sibos 2026. While the world talks about the future of finance, Ripple is building it. Ripple will be showcasing how XRP and Ripple are transforming global liquidity.

BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!!!

Early replies (first 3)

62062798
>>62062758
KA-BOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62062809
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!!!!

62063021
Hasn’t Chainlink attended this shit like 5 times

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62063071
>>62063021
Not once. What makes you think that?

62063133
>>62062758
KABOOOOOOOOOOOM!!

62063231
why did you crop out the last paragraph?

62063237
>>62063231
>but will sell hot dogs from a cart in an adjacent parking lot
so bullish @ this

62063358
>>62063231
gotta get me some of them hotdogs

62063538
>>62062758
WE'RE GONNA BE INSIDE THE BUILDING

BOOOOOOOOOOOM

62063544
>>62063237
I love hot dogs!!?

BOOOOOOOOOOOOM!

62063629
>>62063021
yes that's the joke, they bent the knee after their last ditch effort featuring chef boyardee

62063655
>>62063231
kek

62063878
>>62063231

62066644
>>62062758
BOOOOOOOM

62066692
linkies get cuckolded again :}
oh it feels me with sooo much sexual pleasure when that happens :}

62066790
>>62063655

62066826
>>62063231
First qnt now ripple. What happend to the multichain future ?
Payment abstraction ? 0
The reserve ? Under water
CCIP ? Taco stand revenue
Shills fishy, clg? Rattled, impotent and seething
Linkies? Disgruntled, sucked dry, lashing out
Their memes? Like their investment, futile and worthless

62071087
>>62063231
there are actually retarded ass stinkies that will believe this

62072358
>>62062758
BOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62072601
>>62062758

>>62063021
Chainlink has been invited to speak at pretty much every Sibos since 2017.

62072753
>>62062758

>WE'RE GOING TO REPLACE SWIFT
To
>we're getting a booth at swift
BOOOM!

62072762
>>62072753

>ripple joins swift partner program

KEEEEEEEEEEK

62072783
>>62072762

Ripple bought a company that was already part of the swift partner program.
Much like they now bought booth space at Sibos.

62076076

62076672

At what? Being left out in the parking lot? Kek

62077070

item.title: Been around any wagies/normies lately? — 50 replies — 9.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Been around any wagies/normies lately?

Open thread • Replies: 50 • Updated: 2026-04-07 05:42 UTC

OP

They are 100% DONE.

Completely and totally blackpilled, they make /pol/tards look like hyper motivated Supermen. The average wagecuck is a zombified corpse shuffling through life and just waiting to die, it's wild. The funniest part is what miniscule amount of energy they have left is used exclusively to hyper aggressively cope with other normalfags.

They all go through this weird dance where they "flex" on each other and put up a fabricated front that they are "doing well" while they all circle the toilet drain together. It makes it impossible to feel sorry for them as they continue to rack up debt and live miserable atomized lives.

Game over goyim

Early replies (first 3)

62080565
>>62080562
My favorite part about this system is that by not playing their "pretending to do well" game, you just save up as much as possible and make it to the other side of the K economy lol

62080574
>>62080562
Nigger I'm demoralized too. You have any fucking idea where you are?

62080580
>>62080562
If you weren't part of the top 10% in 2025, you're lower class

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62081356
>>62081346
I'm actually not even a bad-looking dude, but I live in the middle of nowhere, so I'm competing with Chadvicular in the cities, so I have to travel like fucking Genghis Khan to get pussy.

62081360
>>62081356
I actually enjoyed the travel aspect of it. Visited place I'd never have gone to otherwise just for pussy.

62081363
>>62081360
That's a good way to look at it. Thanks for the confidence boost bro!

62081366
>>62081363
Anytime m8. And it is, I actually do feel serious about that. I remember exploring malls I'd never have gone to otherwise, restaurants I'd never go to otherwise, new areas, all a neat little adventure with the benefit of sex.
Sometimes the sex part wouldn't even happen but I liked exploring new places. If I didn't do that I'd have just lived my usual wagie life and gone nowhere.

62081398
>>62081366
You're right. I'm really looking forward to this summer!

62081519
>>62081311
>>62081346
what's this like?

62081553
>>62081366
>mutts explore malls like if they were monuments

62081576
>>62080950
More like 1 in 10 home owner

62081585
>>62080580
Those 10% are probably majority 60+. No one should be expecting a 19 year old to be millionaire.

62081607
>>62080562
I fucking love my job, problem is i have to work like 15 hours of overtime a week, but i am quite gainfully employed

62081613
>>62081576
>>62080950
>>62080580
Honestly thats not that good considering over 1 in 10 adults is a Baby Boomer

62081614
>>62081613
1 in 5 are boomers, apparently. I just looked it up myself kek

62081625
>>62080562
Eating and drinking is the only thing that brings me momentary relief from this kiked world.

62081712
>>62081356
>>62081360
I used to drive 90 minutes at 120 miles per hour to fuck a fat Swiss girl just across the border from Germany.

62081787
>>62081712
European look so much more sexually arousing compared to American women. I don't know why...

62082042
>>62080562
Normals are priced out of owning housing, they realize working is meaningless since it doesn't cover COL anymore. However their plan is to replace normies with brownoids working at slave wages.

62082126
>>62081124
They used to have a non called out mute button on one of the soft buttons on the side of the screen, so you could at least look away and ignore it; some of them still have it, some don't

62082149
>>62080612
This.

Holy fuck I’m so damn tired of everyone trying to take my money. Fuck this gay earth.

62082172
>>62080562
theyve started to talk the way I talk, which feels strange.

I have a friend who was talking about pedos in power/conspiracies. He was like "idk, maybe anythings possible"

62082215
dunno about other countries but in the US it is abundantly clear you will be poor no matter what anyway so why bother?

62082218
>>62081519
probably smells bad

62082421
>>62082218
/thread

I'm switching to a saggy 41 year old single mother now.

62084147
>>62080562
Well it's easy not to be a normie anymore.
Let go bread and circuses.
At least circuses.
But they can't do that.

62084150
>>62080565
It's a trap. And they fell for it.

62084186
>>62082172
Well they are a long way from saying that viruses don't exist (they don't), and that earth doesn't circle the sun (it doesn't).
And when they will, they won't be normies anymore. But i'm not waiting for them anymore.

62084193
>>62080562
fuck off the board

62084235
>>62080799
America is user-hostile, and maybe always has been. But it is definitely getting worse.

62084283
>>62080612
At least you have a career, gen xoid
>was in my 20s
>was making almost 100k a year
>covid and laid off
>humiliated constantly because the best offer I can get is maybe 20 bucks at an office
>in my30s now
>getting non-busted pussy is impossible because 18yos don't want to fuck over 30
Everything is constantly worse forever and there's no going back, ever. If I had risked my life savings on crypto in 2020, that was the exit, but I was too rational and afraid of being scammed and doomed myself.

62084625
>>62080580
If you aren't a liquid millionaire (high net worth individual) with a paid off estate in 2026, you're lower class

62084914
>>62080580
Trvthnvke
